summary: Created /api/geo Vercel serverless endpoint that reads coarse geolocation (country, region) via geolocation() helper and returns JSON with cache-control: no-store. Created client-side src/input/geo.ts with fetchGeoHint() that fetches the endpoint once with graceful null fallback on any failure. Integrated geo fetch into src/main.ts at startup without blocking rendering. Added tsconfig.api.json for API function compilation. All 15 US-005 tests pass (8 server endpoint + 7 client module).
